brief_title: Prospective Feasibility Study Applying the ACOSOG Z0011 Criteria to Chinese Patients
official_title: A Prospective Feasibility Study Applying the ACOSOG Z0011 Criteria to Chinese Patients With Early Breast Cancer Undergoing Breast-conserving Surgery

pmids.citation: Peng Y, Liu M, Li X, Tong F, Cao Y, Liu P, Zhou B, Liu H, Cheng L, Guo J, Xie F, Yang H, Wang S, Wang C, Chen Y, Wang S. Application of the ACOSOG Z0011 criteria to Chinese patients with breast cancer: a prospective study. World J Surg Oncol. 2021 Apr 20;19(1):128. doi: 10.1186/s12957-021-02242-1.
